subcodes.first_line: O thou messenger on the path to the Friend's abode! With soul and body didst thou hasten, finding no rest until thou didst reach the vicinity of the blessed Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قاصد کوی دوست بجان و تن شتافتی و آرام نیافتی تا بجوار بقعه مبارکه رسیدی
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
